## Status Legend

| Status | Meaning | Typical Duration |
|--------|---------|-----------------|
| ✅ Approved | Submission has been approved and merged | Approved |
| 🔄 In Review | Submission is under review, awaiting approvals | 3-10 days |
| 📝 Draft | Submission created but awaiting initial review | 1-7 days |

---

## Using This Index

### Find Approved Examples

To find an example of an approved DAB submission you can use as a template:

1. Look for submissions with **✅ Approved** status
2. Find one in your domain or similar domain
3. Click the MR link to view the full submission
4. Use as reference for your own DAB

### Check Submission Status

To check the status of an active submission:

1. Look in the current year (2026) section
2. Find your project name
3. Check the Status column
4. For more details on pending approvals, see `active-submissions.md`

### Find Your Domain Team

To find architects in your domain:

1. Check `domain-owners.yml` for your domain
2. See Domain Lead and Architects list
3. Contact them for DAB submission guidance

## Generate Registry Locally

To regenerate this index on your local machine:

```bash
# Install dependencies
pip install PyYAML requests

# Run the generator script
python scripts/generate-dab-index.py --output registry/

# Verify output
cat registry/dab-index.md
cat registry/active-submissions.md
```

For full documentation on the registry, see `registry/README.md`.
